DescribeSpanFieldValues.action: API action name, current value is DescribeSpanFieldValues
DescribeSpanFieldValues.key: Field name. Options: service (application name), host (instance name), duration (response time in microseconds), traceId (Trace ID), attributes.apm.operation (endpoint), attributes.apm.component (request type)
DescribeSpanFieldValues.filters: Filter list. Only the following filters are supported: service (application name)
DescribeSpanFieldValues.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal to, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal to
DescribeSpanFieldValues.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeSpanFieldValues.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
